name: Verbose Bookstore
description: An online bookstore leaks MySQL error messages. Use error-based SQL injection techniques like EXTRACTVALUE or UPDATEXML to exfiltrate the flag.
briefing: PageTurn Books has a search feature that displays verbose database errors when something goes wrong. While UNION-based injection appears blocked by a simple keyword filter, the detailed error messages may provide an alternative data exfiltration channel. A 'credentials' table in the database is said to contain the flag.
objective: Use error-based SQL injection to extract the flag from the credentials table via MySQL error messages.
author: h4ck0rman
